title: senecio costaricensis
intro: Senecio costaricensis, also known as the Costa Rican groundsel, is a plant species native to Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio costaricensis include reducing inflammation and pain, treating wounds and infections, and supporting immune function. Senecio costaricensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the herbal preparation allowing for the extraction of its bioactive compounds and utilization of its medicinal properties.
